title: IssuePickerSuggestionsIssueType
description: A type of issue suggested for use in auto-completion.

id.description: The ID of the type of issues suggested for use in auto-completion.

issues.description: A list of issues suggested for use in auto-completion.

label.description: The label of the type of issues suggested for use in auto-completion.

msg.description: If no issue suggestions are found, returns a message indicating no suggestions were found,

sub.description: If issue suggestions are found, returns a message indicating the number of issues suggestions found and returned.
